mapper.select: SELECT CASE user_status WHEN 0 THEN '待审批' WHEN 1 THEN '正常' WHEN 2 THEN '已离职' ELSE '未知' END AS name, COUNT(*) AS count FROM tb_user WHERE is_deleted = 0 GROUP BY user_status ORDER BY user_status
SELECT COALESCE(NULLIF(gender, ''), '未填写') AS name, COUNT(*) AS count FROM tb_user WHERE is_deleted = 0 GROUP BY gender ORDER BY count DESC
SELECT COALESCE(NULLIF(highest_degree, ''), '未填写') AS name, COUNT(*) AS count FROM tb_user WHERE is_deleted = 0 GROUP BY highest_degree ORDER BY count DESC
SELECT COALESCE(NULLIF(political_status, ''), '未填写') AS name, COUNT(*) AS count FROM tb_user WHERE is_deleted = 0 GROUP BY political_status ORDER BY count DESC
SELECT COALESCE(NULLIF(marital_status, ''), '未填写') AS name, COUNT(*) AS count FROM tb_user WHERE is_deleted = 0 GROUP BY marital_status ORDER BY count DESC

SELECT COALESCE(tb_department.dept_name, '未分配部门') AS name, COUNT(tb_user.id) AS count FROM tb_user LEFT JOIN tb_department ON tb_user.department_id = tb_department.id AND tb_department.is_deleted = 0 WHERE tb_user.is_deleted = 0 GROUP BY tb_user.department_id, tb_department.dept_name ORDER BY count DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_user WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND user_status = 1 AND estimated_conversion_date > CURDATE()
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_user WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND user_status = 1 AND estimated_conversion_date <= CURDATE()
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_user WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND user_status = 1 AND DATE_FORMAT(estimated_conversion_date, '%Y-%m') = DATE_FORMAT(CURDATE(), '%Y-%m')

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(estimated_conversion_date, '%Y-%m') AS month, COUNT(*) AS count FROM tb_user WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND user_status = 1 AND estimated_conversion_date >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 12 MONTH) AND estimated_conversion_date <= CURDATE() GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(estimated_conversion_date, '%Y-%m') ORDER BY month

SELECT probation_period AS probationPeriod, COUNT(*) AS count FROM tb_user WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND user_status = 1 AND probation_period IS NOT NULL GROUP BY probation_period ORDER BY probation_period
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_resignation WHERE is_deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_resignation WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND DATE_FORMAT(resignation_date, '%Y-%m') = DATE_FORMAT(CURDATE(), '%Y-%m')

SELECT CASE resignation_type WHEN 1 THEN '主动离职' WHEN 2 THEN '辞退' WHEN 3 THEN '合同到期' WHEN 4 THEN '其他' ELSE '未知' END AS typeName, COUNT(*) AS count FROM tb_resignation WHERE is_deleted = 0 GROUP BY resignation_type ORDER BY count DESC

SELECT COALESCE(tb_department.dept_name, '未分配部门') AS departmentName, COUNT(DISTINCT tb_user.id) AS totalCount, COUNT(DISTINCT tb_resignation.id) AS resignationCount FROM tb_user LEFT JOIN tb_department ON tb_user.department_id = tb_department.id AND tb_department.is_deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN tb_resignation ON tb_user.id = tb_resignation.user_id AND tb_resignation.is_deleted = 0 WHERE tb_user.is_deleted = 0 GROUP BY tb_user.department_id, tb_department.dept_name ORDER BY resignationCount DESC

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(resignation_date, '%Y-%m') AS month, COUNT(*) AS count FROM tb_resignation WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND resignation_date >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 12 MONTH) GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(resignation_date, '%Y-%m') ORDER BY month

SELECT tb_user.employee_number AS employeeNumber, tb_user.nick_name AS nickName, tb_user.gender AS gender, tb_user.mobile AS mobile, tb_user.email AS email, tb_department.dept_name AS departmentName, tb_post.post_name AS postName, tb_professional_title.title_name AS professionalTitleName, CASE tb_user.user_status WHEN 0 THEN '待审批' WHEN 1 THEN '正常' WHEN 2 THEN '已离职' ELSE '未知' END AS userStatusDesc, DATE_FORMAT(tb_user.entry_date, '%Y-%m-%d') AS entryDate, tb_user.highest_degree AS highestDegree, tb_user.political_status AS politicalStatus, tb_user.marital_status AS maritalStatus FROM tb_user LEFT JOIN tb_department ON tb_user.department_id = tb_department.id AND tb_department.is_deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN tb_post ON tb_user.post_id = tb_post.id AND tb_post.is_deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN tb_professional_title ON tb_user.professional_title_id = tb_professional_title.id AND tb_professional_title.is_deleted = 0 WHERE tb_user.is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY tb_user.employee_number

SELECT tb_user.employee_number AS employeeNumber, tb_user.nick_name AS nickName, tb_department.dept_name AS departmentName, tb_post.post_name AS postName, DATE_FORMAT(tb_user.entry_date, '%Y-%m-%d') AS entryDate, tb_user.probation_period AS probationPeriod, DATE_FORMAT(tb_user.estimated_conversion_date, '%Y-%m-%d') AS estimatedConversionDate, CASE WHEN tb_user.estimated_conversion_date <= CURDATE() THEN '已转正' ELSE '试用期中' END AS conversionStatus FROM tb_user LEFT JOIN tb_department ON tb_user.department_id = tb_department.id AND tb_department.is_deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN tb_post ON tb_user.post_id = tb_post.id AND tb_post.is_deleted = 0 WHERE tb_user.is_deleted = 0 AND tb_user.user_status = 1 AND tb_user.probation_period IS NOT NULL ORDER BY tb_user.estimated_conversion_date

SELECT tb_user.employee_number AS employeeNumber, tb_user.nick_name AS nickName, tb_department.dept_name AS departmentName, CASE tb_resignation.resignation_type WHEN 1 THEN '主动离职' WHEN 2 THEN '辞退' WHEN 3 THEN '合同到期' WHEN 4 THEN '其他' ELSE '未知' END AS resignationTypeDesc, DATE_FORMAT(tb_resignation.resignation_date, '%Y-%m-%d') AS resignationDate, tb_resignation.resignation_reason AS resignationReason, handover_user.nick_name AS handoverUserName FROM tb_resignation INNER JOIN tb_user ON tb_resignation.user_id = tb_user.id AND tb_user.is_deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN tb_department ON tb_user.department_id = tb_department.id AND tb_department.is_deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN tb_user handover_user ON tb_resignation.handover_user_id = handover_user.id AND handover_user.is_deleted = 0 WHERE tb_resignation.is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY tb_resignation.resignation_date DESC
